title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Tata Elxsi Global Group - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Tata Elxsi Global Group - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Backend Developer looking for your next big career move? Tata Elxsi Global Group in Gwalior offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Tata Elxsi Global Group:
Tata Elxsi Global Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in JavaScript

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Learning & development budget
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Tata Elxsi Global Group!
